items.name: signetai
items.description: Local-first identity, memory, and secrets for AI agents. Portable state across models and harnesses.

items.name: HiClaw
items.description: An open-source Collaborative Multi-Agent OS for transparent, human-in-the-loop task coordination via Matrix rooms.

items.name: agentsocialbench
items.description: AgentSocialBench is the first benchmark for evaluating privacy preservation in human-centered agentic social networks — settings where teams of AI agents serve individual users across multiple domains, coordinate on shared tasks, and must protect sensitive personal information throughout.

items.name: tyclaw.rs
items.description: 企业级AI Agent的Rust实现，支持沙箱隔离，审计安全，使用统计，钉钉接入等实用功能。

items.name: qwen-code
items.description: An open-source AI agent that lives in your terminal.

items.name: KohakuTerrarium
items.description: KohakuTerrarium is a general-purpose AI agent framework and batteries-included app for building, running, and composing self-contained agents and multi-agent teams, with built-in tools, sub-agents, persistent sessions, TUI, and web UI.

items.name: Observal
items.description: Observal is an AI agent registry with first in class observabilty and eval framework

items.name: DashClaw
items.description: 🛡️Decision infrastructure for AI agents. Intercept actions, enforce guard policies, require approvals, and produce audit-ready decision trails.

items.name: OpenBB
items.description: Financial data platform for analysts, quants and AI agents.
